vibe_protocol_components.description: A universal chart component. Supports 'type': 'bar' | 'area' | 'line'. Always requires 'dataSource'.
A universal data table. Automatically discovers columns from data (Max 10). Supports 'dataSource'.

props.title: Header for the table
props.columns: Optional array of { header, accessorKey } to override auto-discovery

vibe_protocol_components.description: A standardized KPI card for showing single values and trends.

props.title: Metric label
props.trend: Numeric percentage change (positive for up, negative for down)
